{{CargoRelic
|name=Magic Mirror
|rank=AAA
|affct=FTH
|birthday=07-11
|source=Fragment Crafting (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
|description=On Jul 11, AD 1501, the magic mirror told the Queen a secret and caused a tragedy.

The magic mirror was a treasure of the Evil Queen. She wanted to become the most beautiful woman in the world, so she expelled Snow White to the Black Forest and tried to kill her with a poisoned apple, but Snow White survived. Under the instigation of the mirror, the Evil Queen decided to kill Snow White. But we all know the plan eventually failed.

[Basic Info]

Spell: "Mirror, mirror on the wall, who's the fairest of them all?"
|fame=37
|art=50
|fth=73
|civ=42
|tech=41
|ss1=Per 3 kinds of souls offered, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 3 kinds of souls offered, Snail DEF +3<br>Distinct Souls Offered: 300/300
|ss2=Per 3 kinds of souls offered, Snail ATK +4<br>Per 3 kinds of souls offered, Snail DEF +4<br>Distinct Souls Offered: 300/300
|ss3=Per 3 kinds of souls offered, Snail ATK +5<br>Per 3 kinds of souls offered, Snail DEF +5<br>Distinct Souls Offered: 300/300
|ss4=Per 3 kinds of souls offered, Snail ATK +7<br>Per 3 kinds of souls offered, Snail DEF +7<br>Distinct Souls Offered: 300/300
|ss5=Per 3 kinds of souls offered, Snail ATK +9<br>Per 3 kinds of souls offered, Snail DEF +9<br>Distinct Souls Offered: 300/300
|ss7=Per 3 kinds of souls offered, Snail ATK +9<br>Per 3 kinds of souls offered, Snail DEF +9<br>Distinct Souls Offered: 300/300<br>Snail ATK +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Quarry skill II.png|50px]] Place in Quarry: Stone Output +15%
|skill2=[[File:Quarry skill II.png|50px]] Place in Quarry: Find Ancient Fossil by +15%
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Purple Relics]]
[[Category:FTH Relics]]
[[Category:Purple FTH Relics]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Distinct Souls Boost]]
[[Category:Quarry Skill]]
[[Category:Quarry Output Boost]]
[[Category:Ancient Fossil Boost]]
[[Category:Demon Cell Drop Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Distinct Souls Offered]]
[[Category:Imp Boost]]
